svg.text: Decision Pop-ups, Option Tabs and Card Selection

g.text: Provides a simple interface for editing decision interactions. Supports editing decision-making content
including decision time, presentation of options, and interaction methods.
Invoked through default configurations or the node graph. Sends Decision Pop-up Completion Event upon timeout or after interaction.
Add: UI Control Group Editor Window, add UI control template - Deck Selector (default UI controls group)
Parameters used to invoke the Deck Selector node
If unchecked, not visible when activated. Adjustable via Node Graph
Editable title at the top when checked
Supports editing the display title text
Show the current number of selected items in the interface.
Show the minimum and maximum number of resettable options.
Auto-closes when countdown ends. If player completes early, visibility depends on Decision Completion Style/Duration.
Flashing red warning effect when countdown reaches configured time.
Manually collapse, postpone handling or wait for timeout
Adds close control. Triggers Decision Completion - Closed manually event
Play animation and switch to actual return value
For node graph invocation. Increments from 1, cannot be modified.
Known: configurable icon | Unknown: question mark, use with Reveal Result + countdown
Icon when enabled in general settings. Title/Description are text configs.

svg.text: III. Managing Deck Selector Through Node Graphs

g.text: Decision result/option list = Card ID. Decision max/min limit affects selectable options count.

svg.text: IV. Tutorial: Card Selector - Selection Pop-ups and Option Tabs

g.text: Random items in Roguelike games, random effects after level up. Examples: choose 1 from 3, choose 2 from 4.
Add Card Selector in In-Game Editor via UI Control Group Library prefab template
Configure Page Settings: Title Text, disable Skip Selection
Configure Deck Settings - Edit Details: add tabs, modify Type, Icon, Title, Description
Add trigger: Interactive Button in Interface Layout to open the pop-up
When UI control group is triggered (button pressed)
Use Card Selector to create the pop-up effect
Cond 1: Binary branch - check card selector index (needed when multiple selectors exist)
Cond 2: Binary branch - determine completion reason (avoid timeout triggers)
Cond 3: Multiple branch - determine selection result (list returned, take values from list)
Result: Execute corresponding effect based on selected card
Mount node graph on the player in In-Game Editor
Enter Test Run to verify the feature
After opening a chest, a 4-choose-2 window pops up. One card has a random effect via node graph logic.
Add new Card Selector in UI Control Group Library
Add Player Custom Variable: Effect of Unknown Card Obtained (Integer, Initial: 0)
Add Text Box for effect hint showing random effect variable
Configure card selector Page Settings and Option Configuration
Create chest trigger prefab with Option Card component and trigger area
Node Graph on Chest: When tab selected, invoke Card Selector, disable tab, set chest state
Node Graph on Player: After selection, use List Iteration + Multiple Branches for 2 results
Known card: add special effects. Unknown card: HP deduction displayed via UI text box.
Mount node graphs on respective prefabs and save
Place prefabs in scene and enter Test Mode
Prerequisites: Collision/Interaction Triggering Events, UI Controls Display. Tutorial file: CardSelector.gil
